allow: Bash(find /d/Nikabond/nikabond -type f -name "*role*" -o -name "*Role*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".next" | head -30)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py makemigrations role 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py migrate role 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -25)
